        "description": "Current power consumption in watts."

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

Review batch-8 complete! I've created [review-batch-8-complete.json](C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaPlus\coordination\outputs\review-batch-8-complete.json) with all 17 devices and their complete logic descriptions.

**Summary:**
- ✅ All 17 devices processed with comprehensive logic type coverage
- ✅ Verified Mode/Setting/Ratio against Stationpedia data
- ✅ Added 237+ missing logic type entries
- ✅ Devices range from complex (Sorter: 13 logic types) to simple (structural pieces: 3 hash types only)

**Key findings:**
- **Sorter**: Mode controls sorting algorithm (Split/Filter/Logic), Output controls destination in Logic mode
- **GasMixer**: Setting is mix ratio 0-100%, Ratio is current flow state
- **BackPressureRegulator**: Setting is threshold pressure, opens when input exceeds it
- **LogicReader**: Setting is read-only value from data input
- **Battery devices**: Include slot logic for Charge and ChargeRatio

All descriptions follow standard patterns for generic types (Power, On, Error) and device-specific documentation for unique behaviors.
